introSection: Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Saratoga Resort in Lehi, Utah, USA. It was said to have been purchased from Phoenix, Arizona. The Little Dipper was still operating as late as 1980.
fullText: Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Saratoga Resort in Lehi, Utah, USA. It was said to have been purchased from Phoenix, Arizona. The Little Dipper was still operating as late as 1980.
